keyPoints: Statistical Language Model: N-gram model - Markov chain is used to predict the next word in a sentence based on the previous n words
Types of N-gram models: Unigram (single word), Bigram (pair of words)
Paninion Framework: Incorporate word context to improve language model's performance
Karaka Theory: Means that the words in a sentence follow certain patterns, which can be learned by the language model
